title: atractylodes lyrata var. ternata
intro: Atractylodes lyrata var. ternata, also known as the white atractylodes or false atractylodes, is a type of plant in the sunflower family that is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to expel dampness, reduce swelling, and relieve pain, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of atractylodes include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and fever, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being. Atractylodes can be prepared in various ways, including as a decoction, powder, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
